use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH ACUTE LYMPHOBLASTIC LEUKEMIA WITH AN ORAL SOLUTION OF METHOTREXATE
TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH MYCOSIS FUNGOIDES WITH AN ORAL SOLUTION OF METHOTREXATE
TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH RELAPSED OR REFRACTORY NON-HODGKIN LYMPHOMAS WITH AN ORAL SOLUTION OF METHOTREXATE
TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH RHEUMATOID ARTHRITIS WITH AN ORAL SOLUTION OF METHOTREXATE
TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH SEVERE PSORIASIS WITH AN ORAL SOLUTION OF METHOTREXATE

indications.text:
Space Accumulation
1.1 Neoplastic Diseases
6 ADVERSE REACTIONS
1.2 Rheumatoid Arthritis
6.1 Clinical Trials Experience
1.3 Polyarticular Juvenile Idiopathic Arthritis
6.2 Postmarketing Experience
1.4 Psoriasis
7 DRUG INTERACTIONS

1.1 Neoplastic Diseases
JYLAMVO is indicated for the:
• treatment of adults with acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL) as part of a combination chemotherapy maintenance regimen.
• treatment of adults with mycosis fungoides (cutaneous T-cell lymphoma) as a single agent or as part of a combination
